keyEvents.text: Ties Kerssies (Sint Maarten) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Goal!  Sint Maarten 0, Saint Lucia 1. Dominic Poleon (Saint Lucia) right footed shot from the centre of the box to the top left corner. Assisted by Gregson President.
First Half ends, Sint Maarten 0, Saint Lucia 1.
Substitution, Sint Maarten. Elmer de Vries replaces T-Shawn Illidge.
Goal!  Sint Maarten 0, Saint Lucia 2. Dominic Poleon (Saint Lucia) right footed shot from the centre of the box to the centre of the goal.
Goal!  Sint Maarten 1, Saint Lucia 2. Chovanie Amatkarijo (Sint Maarten) from a free kick with a right footed shot to the top right corner.
Goal!  Sint Maarten 1, Saint Lucia 3. Reeco Hackett-Fairchild (Saint Lucia) left footed shot from the centre of the box to the top right corner. Assisted by Gregson President   following a corner.
Substitution, Saint Lucia. Ridel Stanislas replaces Jevick MacFarlane.
Substitution, Sint Maarten. Imar Kort replaces Kay Gerritsen.
Substitution, Sint Maarten. Duane Tjen-A-Kwoei replaces Sergio Hughes.
Substitution, Sint Maarten. Oliver Hobgood replaces Ties Kerssies.
Goal!  Sint Maarten 1, Saint Lucia 4. Ridel Stanislas (Saint Lucia) left footed shot from the centre of the box to the top left corner. Assisted by Dominic Poleon.
Substitution, Saint Lucia. Leaus Henville replaces Reeco Hackett-Fairchild.
Substitution, Saint Lucia. Alvinus Myers replaces Josh Solomon-Davies because of an injury.
Substitution, Saint Lucia. Brandon Sandiford replaces Gregson President.
Substitution, Sint Maarten. Diaro Forsythe replaces Chovanie Amatkarijo.
Goal!  Sint Maarten 1, Saint Lucia 5. Dominic Poleon (Saint Lucia) right footed shot from the centre of the box to the bottom left corner. Assisted by Leaus Henville with a headed pass.
Second Half ends, Sint Maarten 1, Saint Lucia 5.
